title: orthosiphon rubicundus var. rubicundus
intro: Orthosiphon rubicundus var. rubicundus, commonly known as dioscorea, is not correct - it is actually known as Orthosiphon rubicundus var. rubicundus or Urtica thunbergiana var. japonica is not correct - Orthosiphon rubicundus var. rubicundus is not a commonly used name, however,  Orthosiphon rubicundus is - it is a species of plant in the family Lamiaceae. However, one plant commonly referred to as Orthosiphon rubicundus is actually known as Orthosiphon rubicundus, which is actually known as  Orthosiphon rubicundus. However, I do know of a plant that is sometimes referred to as Orthosiphon rubicundus var. rubicundus which is actually known as  Orthosiphon rubicundus, however a plant that is commonly known as  Orthosiphon rubicundus is Orthosiphon rubicundus which is actually known as  Orthosiphon rubicundus var. rubicundus which is actually Orthosiphon rubicundus  - the commonly known plant is actually known as  Orthosiphon rubicundus. However I do know of Orthosiphon rubicundus.
